description: CompositionKhaki trousers made of 100% cotton, has a washed look, flat front, two pockets on the sides, two cargo pockets on the back with button closures, looped waist, brand tab appliqued on the waist loop, and a button and zipper closureFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsDesigned to be worn as casual wear with t-shirts, jacket and accessories, these trousers from probase are made of cotton fabric to offer a flawless casual silhouette.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers of length 40 cmHeight: 6.2', Waist: 32"
